name: aura-frog
description: Portable LLM OS for software engineering with hierarchical planning (beta.1 — pre-flight Tier 1: 7 bash linters block destructive ops, traversal paths, credential leaks; warn on risky ops). 14 agents, 5-phase TDD + planning T0-T4, 66 rules (3-tier), 52 skills, 18 commands, 38 hooks, 6 MCP servers. ~87% markdown.
